📋 Long period - powerful waves

programme.title: ⭐⭐ 3.4m @ 15s OFFSHORE
programme.desc:
3.4m Supertubos with offshore wind? Today we separate the men from the boys, and probably their bodyboards too.
🌊 Swell: 3.4m @ 15s 💨 Wind: 15.0km/h N (OFFSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 25.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.2m
